data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a strong easterly airstream, it will be windy over the coast of Guangdong today. A trough of low pressure will bring showers and thunderstorms to the northern part of the South China Sea. The easterly airstream is expected to be replaced by a southerly airstream gradually in the next couple of days. There will still be showers over Guangdong early to midweek this week. With an anticyclone aloft strengthening, the weather will improve and it will be persistently hot over southern China in the latter part of this week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260517","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"East force 5, up to force 7 offshore and on high ground, gusty at times.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with occasional showers.
